cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog is wearing a small, cute graduation cap. A banner behind it says 'Nível 1 Concluído!'. The dog looks proud. Confetti is in the air. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A celebratory, slow-motion shot with confetti falling gently around the proud dog. The camera slowly zooms in on its happy face.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A montage of the dog's best moments from the past 4 weeks: learning to sit, the first successful 'vem', ignoring a distraction, playing with its owner. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: An emotional, fast-paced montage with inspiring music, showing the journey and the progress made.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The owner gives the dog a special new toy or a delicious, elaborate treat as a graduation present. A moment of pure joy and reward. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A close-up on the special reward and the dog's ecstatic reaction. Sparkles and celebration graphics appear.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A graphic of a trophy with 'Nível 1' on it. The trophy shines and sparkles. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The trophy animates, rotating and gleaming to signify a major accomplishment.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final screen showing the dog looking towards a path labeled 'Nível 2: Intermediário'. Text overlay: 'A Jornada Continua... Você está pronto?'. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The dog looks ahead with determination. The path to Nível 2 lights up, building excitement for the next stage of the course. The text fades in with a bold, adventurous font.
